
### TLS state machine attack  {.smaller}


* from [https://mitls.org/pages/attacks/SMACK](https://mitls.org/pages/attacks/SMACK)
* protocol: 

   * step 1: verify server identity
   * step 2: receive messages from server

* attack: 

   * if server sends ‘‘here's your next message’’, <br> instead of ‘‘here's my identity’’ <br>
   * then broken client ignores verifying server's identity
